rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IN ENTIRETY. FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. NO SPECIFIC QUESTIONS REGARDING DEFENDANT AT PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION OR IN THE INTERROGATORIES. See Scheiding v. Dinwiddie Construction Co., (1999) 69 Cal.App.4th 64, 80. ADDITIONALLY, NO AFFIRMATIVE EVIDENCE OR CITATION TO FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY TO SUPPORT ASSERTION THAT MARKET SHARE THEORY OF LIABILITY CANNOT BE ESTABLISHED. See Wheeler v. Raybestos-Manhattan, (1992) 8 Cal.App.4th 1152. DENY DEFENDANT'S CCP 437c(h) REQUEST BECAUSE NO SHOWING OF DILIGENCE, ISSUE RAISED IN REPLY, AND DEFENDANT'S MOTION. (PB)
MOTION TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT GRANTED ON CONDITION PLAINTIFF STIPULATE TO DELETE CLAIM OF "OTHER ACTS OF HARASSMENT." (JH)
GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER COMPLY WITH CCP 437C(G).

RE DEFT METALCLAD - OFF CALENDAR, DEFT DISMISSED. RE DEFT SEARS ROEBUCK & CO - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER COMPLY WITH CCP 437C(G). DEFT INTERNATIONAL TRUCK MSJ - OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

MP-DEFT TARKETT MSJ - GRANT IF PROVIDE TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE, NO OPPOSITION FILED, OTHERWISE OFF CALENDAR. MP-DEFT METALCLAD MSJ - OFF CALENDAR, DEFT DISMISSED. MP-DEFT AMAX INDUSTRIAL MSJ - OFF CALENDAR, DEFT DISMISSED.
GRANT IF PROVIDE TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE, NO OPPOSITION FILED, OTHERWISE OFF CALENDAR.

DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IN ENTIRETY. FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. NO SPECIFIC QUESTIONS REGARDING DEFENDANT AT PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION OR IN THE INTERROGATORIES. See Scheiding v. Dinwiddie Construction Co., (1999) 69 Cal.App.4th 64, 80. ADDITIONALLY, NO AFFIRMATIVE EVIDENCE OR CITATION TO FACTUALLY DEVOID DISCOVERY TO SUPPORT ASSERTION THAT MARKET SHARE THEORY OF LIABILITY CANNOT BE ESTABLISHED. See Wheeler v. Raybestos-Manhattan, (1992) 8 Cal.App.4th 1152. DENY DEFENDANT'S CCP 437c(h) REQUEST BECAUSE NO SHOWING OF DILIGENCE, ISSUE RAISED IN REPLY, AND DEFENDANT'S MOTION. (PB)
GRANT IF PROVIDE TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE, NO OPPOSITION FILED, OTHERWISE OFF CALENDAR. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS NOT DATED.
GRANT IF PROVIDE TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE, NO OPPOSITION FILED, OTHERWISE OFF CALENDAR.
GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SHIFT BURDEN BECAUSE RESPONSE IS FACTUALLY DEVOID AND EVASIVE. MOTION FOR 437C(H)CONTINUANCE DENIED BECAUSE NO EXCUSE FOR LATE NOTICED DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF EMPLOYER. (CW)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SHIFT BURDEN - RESPONSE IS FACTUALLY DEVOID AND EVASIVE. MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE 437C(H) DENIED - COUNSEL DECLARATIONS PROVIDES NO EXCUSE FOR LATE NOTICE. (CW)

MOTION FOR DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE DISCHARGE GRANTED. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. PLAINTIFF RESIGNED WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF THE REPORT OF MISCONDUCT. PLAINTIFF ON LEAVE OF ABSENCE AT TIME. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION GRANTED. NO VIOLATION OF LABOR CODE SECTION 1050 ET SEQ. (GK(EX)
